text:
Guest tools for VMware Server 1.x host.

Fix: Note:
These ports are based on the works of emulators/vmware-guestd5 and
emulators/vmware-tools5.

Please repo-copy as following before commit:
emulators/vmware-guestd5 to emulators/vmware-server-guestd1
emulators/vmware-tools5 to emulators/vmware-server-tools1
